name: fold
description: Fold long lines for finite width output device

options.name: -b
options.description: Count width in bytes rather than column positions

options.name: -s
options.description:
Fold line after the last blank character within the first width
column positions (or bytes)

options.name: -w
options.description:
Specify a line width to use instead of the default 80 columns.
The width value should be a multiple of 8 if tabs are present,
or the tabs should be expanded using expand(1) before using
fold
